positive: A hyper-detailed, stylized illustration featuring a whimsical and magical forest scene. The main subject is a group of glowing fireflies emitting soft, warm bioluminescence, surrounding a fantastical, stylized oak tree adorned with glowing mushrooms and hanging vines. The composition should be centered, focusing on a central vertical arrangement. Use a silhouette style with highly saturated, jewel-toned colors (deep emerald, sapphire blue, amethyst purple) contrasted against clean, black areas. Strong, dynamic light sources coming from the fireflies and mushrooms, creating dramatic rim lighting and deep shadows. Print-optimized for apparel, with clean lines and vector-like quality. Style: Mid-century modern illustration meets stained glass art. Minimal background clutter, maximal magical atmosphere.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, logo, trademark, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, low detail, photographic, realism, muddy colors
